health_conditions: chronic pelvic girdle and hip pain

side_effects.description: Anxiety increased at 250mcg BPC alone; full panic attacks with Tirz 10mg + 500mcg BPC combination; ended up hospitalized with non-stop panic attacks for 9 hours until sedated

protocol_notes: BPC was compounded into Tirz at ~500mcg per 10mg. Had $600 worth of Tirz too scared to use. Tirz alone already increased anxiety somewhat; combination caused explosive anxiety response requiring hospitalization. Trying BPC for 2 ulcers (to prevent perforation like a prior one) and chronic pelvic/hip pain.
